analysis_of_algorithms: comparison-based sorting lower bound (Omega(n log n))
space lower bounds for streaming algorithms
arithmetic_and_number_theory: monotonicity and bounds of the integer logarithm (Nat.log)
divisibility invariants under addition and multiplication
gcd / lcm identities and the product law (gcd a b * lcm a b = a * b)
modular arithmetic identities and parity invariants
sum-of-first-n closed forms and their bounds
discrete_structures_and_combinatorics: counting bounds for binary trees (Catalan growth)
bounds on the number of subsets of a finite set
multivariable_and_extremal_arithmetic: residue structure of a two-variable interaction a*b or a^2+b^2 modulo a composite m (a genuine two-variable fact, not reducible to one variable)
min/max invariants combining min(a,b) and max(a,b) with + and * that need a case split on which is larger
which residues (a+b)^k - a^k - b^k can take modulo a small composite (the mixed cross-terms)
a relation between two constructed quantities: Q1 % m equals Q2 % m for all inputs, or one is always < the other
CRT-style residue classes of a non-linear form modulo 9, 12, 16, or 24 (needs case analysis beyond parity)
residue set of a*b*(a+b) or a*b - a - b modulo a small composite over all a,b
an exact two-variable divisibility: for all a,b a fixed constant divides some non-linear combination of a and b
